name: Galactic Getaway: Build a Home for Pets
short_description: Attract adorable creatures to your cosy home in this life sim, where what you build shapes who arrives and who stays. Decorate, farm and fish — solo or with friends — as you craft a life in the stars that your new companions will come to love.
detailed_description:
Build a home. Attract pets. Grow your world.

Galactic Getaway is a wholesome life sim inspired by games like Viva Piñata. Settle into your own peaceful pocket of space and build a home that attracts adorable creatures. Every crop you grow, every decoration you craft, and every detail you put into your home determines who might arrive and who might choose to stay.

🪴 Carve your very own slice of life in the stars

Your world begins with just the basics — trees, soil and sky. Create your character, choose your style and begin shaping a home that feels like your own.

🛠️ Gather resources, craft furniture and decorate your cozy new home

Everything you place changes how your world feels. Some creatures are drawn to calm. Others love color and clutter. Grow glowing vegetables, gather rare resources and craft furniture and decorations to bring your vision to life.

🐾 Attract adorable little creatures

As your world evolves, new creatures will begin to appear. Each one has its own preferences and personality. Some will visit briefly. Others might settle in if the conditions feel right. Keep changing and experimenting to learn what makes them stay.

🎯 Relax with light-hearted minigames

Between farming and decorating, take time to unwind with a selection of wholesome mini-games. From pastel tank battles to spaceball and fashion shows, they’re a fun way to earn rewards and enjoy the sillier side of your getaway

🧑‍🤝‍🧑 Play Solo or With Friends

Invite your friends to visit, decorate, and collect pets together. Trade decorations, team up to attract rare creatures, or just relax while your planets come to life.

👕 Customize Your Character

Design a cozy explorer that feels like you. Choose your hairstyle, outfit, and color palette Whether you're going full pastel space-elf or rugged galactic gardener, your vibe helps shape the world around you.

F.A.Q.

Does the game have controller support?

Yes! Although it's a work in progress.

Do I need internet to play this game?

Yes, at the start of every play session you need an internet connection to play.

Do I have to play multiplayer?

No, after the initial connection you can play the game singleplayer.

Is the game localized in other languages than English?

Not yet but we plan to do so hopefully by the end of the year.
